detail.description:
Welcome to Arrow Madness - the addictive FREE arrow puzzle game designed to test your logic. Follow the arrows, solve each puzzle, and escape into a soothing neon flow.
 
This isn't just a simple tap game - it is a top-tier brain game that combines the addictive mechanics of snake puzzles with classic block escape strategies.
